info.title: Forafix API Documentation
info.description: Marketplace API with Wallet, Escrow and Booking management

get.summary: List vetted agents with optional filters

post.summary: Toggle agent in user's preferred list

get.summary: Get public user profile by UUID

post.summary: Send password reset link to email

get.summary: Get specific place details by ID

post.summary: Upload and update user profile picture
Pay for a booking using wallet balance (Escrow)
Verify and save card after Paystack checkout
Submit a report/compliant against an agent

get.summary: List all active user sessions and tokens

delete.summary: Revoke a specific session or token

post.summary: Revoke all other active sessions and tokens

get.summary: Get user activity statistics and history
Verify email address via signed link
